channel.title: GitHub Zig Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Zig in GitHub

item.title: ziglang/zig
item.description: General-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal, and reusable software.

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: blackboardsh/electrobun
item.description: Build ultra fast, tiny, and cross-platform desktop apps with Typescript.

item.title: Dr-Nekoma/lyceum
item.description: An MMO game written in Erlang (+ PostgreSQL) + Zig (+ Raylib)

item.title: rockorager/libvaxis
item.description: a modern tui library written in zig

item.title: ZigEmbeddedGroup/microzig
item.description: Unified abstraction layer and HAL for several microcontrollers

item.title: capy-ui/capy
item.description: 💻Build one codebase and get native UI on Windows, Linux and Web

item.title: Not-Nik/raylib-zig
item.description: Manually tweaked, auto-generated raylib bindings for zig. https://github.com/raysan5/raylib

item.title: zigtools/zls
item.description: A Zig language server supporting Zig developers with features like autocomplete and goto definition
